C:\Windows\system32\wsl.exe --distribution Debian --exec /bin/bash -c "export CMAKE_COLOR_DIAGNOSTICS=ON && export CLION_IDE=TRUE && export JETBRAINS_IDE=TRUE && cd /mnt/d/coder/Works/c-extra/extra-2/cmake-build-debug-wsl && /usr/bin/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -G 'CodeBlocks - Unix Makefiles' -S /mnt/d/coder/Works/c-extra/extra-2 -B /mnt/d/coder/Works/c-extra/extra-2/cmake-build-debug-wsl"
-- Configuring done
-- Generating done
-- Build files have been written to: /mnt/d/coder/Works/c-extra/extra-2/cmake-build-debug-wsl
